arts.ttl: Moyes delivers injury update on key Everton quartet ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: Everton boss David Moyes has issued an injury update on four of his key players ahead of facing Liverpool in the Premier League. The Toffees make the short journey to Anfield for the Merseyside Derby on Wednesday, with kickoff scheduled for 8pm UK time.
